label: FACIS SFTP — Kafka Publish
info:
rdkafka producer to ${INGEST_DEFAULT_TOPIC} (default sftp.ingest.raw).

BROKER LIST: must contain all 3 Stackable broker addresses. Single-bootstrap
configs disconnect on metadata refresh. Configure via the
`facis-sftp-orce-env` Secret rendered by this chart, then reference in the
ORCE chart's envFrom (see chart README).

Kafka producer params (mirrors sftp-ingestion-service/src/kafka_publisher.py:19-27):
  linger.ms = 100
  batch.num.messages = 500
  retry.backoff.ms = 500
  message.send.max.retries = 5

These rdkafka producer options are set on the broker config node. If the
contrib version doesn't expose them in its UI, declare them via the broker
config file directly.

Delivery flow:
  link-in sftp.envelope → fn-prep (builds topic/key/payload + emits archive
    request via side-output) → rdkafka out → catch-on-failure → DLQ.

Metric increments live in fn-prep so per-publish counter latency stays low.

name: prepare kafka msg + metric
format publish failure
